name: Cheese Straws
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together flour, salt, cayenne pepper, and grated cheddar cheese thoroughly.
3. Add melted margarine and mix until combined.
4. Chill dough in the refrigerator for 20 minutes.
5. Place dough on a large, floured board. Cover with a sheet of wax paper or use a heavily-floured rolling pin.
6. Roll dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
7. Remove wax paper. Using a fork, hold it upside down and draw the prongs vertically along the dough from top to bottom, creating ridges.
8. Cut the dough into rectangular shapes measuring 3 x 1 inch using a wide, flat knife.
9. Oil a cookie sheet and place the cheese straws on it.
10. Bake in the preheated oven at 400°F for 10-12 minutes until the cheese straws are dry but not brown. Let cool.
11. Repeat the procedure with any remaining dough. Serve at room temperature. Freezes well. Yields approximately 7 dozen.
